articles.author: A. Reporter
articles.title: Global markets open higher after fresh earnings reports
articles.description: Stocks rose in early trading as investors reacted to company results and inflation signals.
articles.content: Stocks in several regions moved higher after a new round of earnings reports. Traders also watched incoming inflation data.

articles.author: B. Writer
articles.title: New battery breakthrough could reduce charging times
articles.description: Researchers say a prototype battery design showed faster charging during lab tests.
articles.content: The research team said the prototype maintained stability while reaching faster charging benchmarks in controlled tests.

articles.author: C. Desk
articles.title: City transit service expands weekend operations
articles.description: Officials said the schedule change is aimed at improving access for riders during peak weekend hours.
articles.content: Transit officials announced longer operating windows on weekends and said they will monitor ridership after the change.
